persona_set_note: md5 + lastUpdated of the canonical 22-…/persona-categories.json this asset was built against. The N38 count-triad assertion (qc-assert-repo-consistency.py:_persona_set_triad_failures) and persona-set-asset-consistency-guard.yml fail CI if blueprint dirs != categories keys != persona_count != canonical_persona_count. TRIAD NOTE (v2.3.0): the published v2.3.0 asset embeds 81 personas; persona_count/canonical_persona_count are bumped to 81 here to point the fleet at the new asset. persona_set_md5 + persona_set_version above are the v2.2.1 values and MUST be re-stamped against the 81-key persona-categories.json when the 16 new blueprint dirs + categories keys land, so the SET triad (blueprint dirs == categories keys == persona_count == canonical_persona_count == 81) is satisfied in a single mergeable change. Rebuild incrementally via shared-utils/prebuilt-index/build-and-publish.sh (HASH-SKIP embeds only the delta) — NEVER a full re-embed.
section_tag_note: embeddings table carries section_number + mode columns. coaching rows at section_number=3, leadership/governance rows at section_number=4. mode values: {both, coaching, leadership}. Section-tagged rows allow mode-aware retrieval without a full re-index.

delta_provider_backstamp.status: RESOLVED — every row in the v2.3.0 asset is stamped provider=gemini/model=gemini-embedding-2/dim=3072 (0 blank-provider rows).
delta_provider_backstamp.defect: gemini-section-indexer.py INSERT omitted provider/model/dim columns. The 11 delta personas added to v2.2.0 arrived with provider=NULL, model=NULL, dim=NULL. init_db() backfill only fires when columns are absent — it never re-runs on existing NULL rows — so the prebuilt v2.2.0 asset shipped with 161 blank-provider rows across the 11 newest personas.
delta_provider_backstamp.fix: gemini-section-indexer.py INSERT now explicitly writes provider='gemini', model=GEMINI_MODEL, dim=GEMINI_OUTPUT_DIM on every row. build-and-publish.sh step 1.5 backstamps any remaining NULL rows after downloading the base asset (no re-embed: inferred from blob length 12288 bytes = 3072 dims * 4 bytes/float32). ensure_v2_1_schema() now adds provider/model/dim columns.
delta_provider_backstamp.verified: 2026-07-04: the published v2.3.0 asset was re-downloaded (no auth) and inspected — 1161 rows / 81 personas, every vector 12288-byte float32 @ dim 3072, single (provider,model,dim) = (gemini, gemini-embedding-2, 3072), 0 NULL/blank-provider rows. get_db_index_provider() returns ('gemini', 'gemini-embedding-2') cleanly.

pr363_personas.note: All 10 PR-363 canonical personas are present in this asset under their canonical slugs, section-tagged (first shipped in v2.1.0; carried forward since).

orphan_blueprints_shipped.note: All 3 orphan-blueprint personas are present in this asset under their canonical slugs, section-tagged, fully operational for both Coaching Mode and Task/Agent-Governance mode (first shipped in v2.1.0).

notes: v2.3.0 — canonical 81-persona SECTION-TAGGED asset with GA gemini-embedding-2 @3072: 81 personas / 1161 section rows, one row per '## Section N' with section_number + mode tags (coaching=3, leadership=4; mode in {both, coaching, leadership}; sections 0–14). Every vector is 12288-byte float32 @ dim 3072; every row is stamped provider=gemini/model=gemini-embedding-2/dim=3072 (0 blank-provider rows). Expands the 65-persona v2.2.1 by the 16 newest book personas. Shipped AS-IS from the operator's live verified index (NO re-embed, NO dedup) — gzip + sha256 + GitHub Release upload only. Clients download this asset instead of re-embedding per box. SHA256 verified against the published release asset before install. FLEET NOTE: this manifest points update-skills.sh at the v2.3.0 asset (via provision-persona-index.sh, which reads asset_url + sha256 + release_tag from here). TRIAD NOTE: the persona-set-asset-consistency-guard requires blueprint dirs == categories keys == persona_count == canonical_persona_count; those repo-side counts (65 on main at publish time) must reach 81 via the 16 new blueprint dirs + persona-categories.json keys in the SAME mergeable change as this manifest bump. Publishing a delta going forward: shared-utils/prebuilt-index/build-and-publish.sh — HASH-SKIP embeds only new/changed personas, REAL-VECTOR HARD GATE (every row gemini/3072) + count triad must pass before upload; then update tests/unit/prebuilt-index-section-tagged.test.sh (KNOWN_TAGS + counts). ROHDE NOTE (open): rohde-the-sketchnote-workbook has a selector category-map gap (_CATEGORY_DOMAINS['design'] does not include visual-storytelling); fix deferred pending per-box index validation.
asset_verified: 2026-07-04: downloaded the published v2.3.0 asset (no auth); sha256 matches this manifest (6cc5f9a1...3cdf); 1161 rows / 81 personas; every vector 12288-byte float32 @ dim 3072; single (provider,model,dim) = (gemini, gemini-embedding-2, 3072); section_number + mode columns present (coaching@3=81, leadership@4=81).
